name: data-warehouse-analytics-kpi-dashboard-generator
description: T175 KPIDashboardGenerator — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Generates KPI snapshots. alertFired computed from FREEDOM config thresholds. Tenant-scoped output.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: alertFired from FREEDOM config thresholds (NEVER hardcoded), tenant-scoped KPI snapshot, threshold comparison logic
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + kpi-snapshot + freedom-config-threshold + alert-computed patterns for T175

Break T175 into: receive trigger → load tenant KPI config from FREEDOM → aggregate current metrics → compare against FREEDOM thresholds → set alertFired=true if threshold exceeded → storeDocument(kpiSnapshot) → return snapshot

Generate kpi-dashboard-generator.service.ts — queue consumer or HTTP trigger, loads KPI thresholds from FREEDOM config (NEVER hardcoded). alertFired = currentValue > threshold from FREEDOM config. Tenant-scoped from ALS. Generates KPISnapshot with tenantId, kpiValues, alertFired, generatedAt. DNA-8: storeDocument(snapshot) before returning.
Named check validation: alert_fired_from_freedom_config, thresholds_not_hardcoded, tenant_scoped_output, kpi_snapshot_stored, tenant_id_from_als
Score generated code 0-100 against T175 iron rules: FREEDOM config thresholds, alertFired computation, tenant isolation, KPI snapshot structure
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=freedom-config-thresholds+alert-fired-computed+tenant-scoped, rejected=hardcoded-thresholds OR alert-fired-hardcoded OR cross-tenant-kpi. curriculumTier=1.
